label: Q4 Volunteering & Responsibility (highlighted ending)
question: Good points. I just have one more question. Some people believe that doing volunteer work is essential for developing a sense of responsibility and empathy. Do you agree, or do you think other activities can be just as beneficial?

statement_reason.full: I agree that doing volunteer work is essential for developing a sense of responsibility because it helps people know more about those who need help.

before_example.full: For example, in the past, I didn’t do volunteer work at all. I didn’t know many poor people, and I did not feel that I was responsible for helping them.

after_example.full: But after I started helping out at a local charity, everything changed. I started talking with the poor families there, so I understood their needs and challenges much better. As a result, I really felt that I had a responsibility to help them more, and I also cherished what I had more.
